note: Ground truth labelled by a human (the assistant) viewing a representative frame of each sequence. The entire COMPLETE session (bags 0-14, ~13 min) is one parked vehicle at a single BARE, UNSUPPORTED development face: rock + survey paint + a muck pile + a parked drill boom; no wire mesh, no rock-bolt plates, no people, no active drilling. So every sequence is UNSUPPORTED. The CRITICAL metric is false_safe = 0: the harness must never call a truly-unsupported face SUPPORTED. (SUPPORTED and DANGER detection are exercised by the unit tests + stub, since no real supported/hazard footage exists in the copied bags.)

sequences.name: seq1
sequences.note: bare face, survey marks, muck pile, parked boom

sequences.note: bare face, boom angled across, no mesh/bolts
